name: python3-arrow
title: python3-arrow
summary: Python3 library to manipulate dates, times, and timestamps
description:
Python3 library to manipulate dates, times, and timestamps
A Python3 library that offers a sensible, human-friendly approach to creating,
manipulating, formatting and converting dates, times, and timestamps.
It implements and updates the datetime type, plugging gaps in functionality,
and provides a module API that supports many common creation scenarios.
Arrow replaces a number of modules: datetime, time, calendar, dateutil, pytz.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-arrow because Python3 library to manipulate dates, times, and timestamps.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-arrow as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-arrow with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-arrow --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
